text:
The sections of the FreeBSD handbook "3.3. Release ISOs" --> 
"3.3.4.  Multi-volume support" at

http://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/articles/releng/release-build.html

use the deprecated `sysinstall' utility. Examples using the `bsdinstall'
utility could perhaps augment this favorably.
